name: SOL IV Blinder
comment: SŌL IV Blinder: Introducing the SŌL IV BLINDER, the most versatile addition to the SŌL Series yet, featuring a grid of four fixtures in a single modular housing. Like the SŌL I and SŌL II, the SŌL IV offers the same cutting-edge technology and powerful LED engine but with even greater creative potential through its multi-fixture design.

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast
Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast
